label: Soleimani assassination
description: US drone strike kills IRGC Quds Force commander Qasem Soleimani at Baghdad airport. Immediate escalation of US-Iran tensions.

label: Iran missile strikes Iraq
description: Iran launches ballistic missiles at two US military bases in Iraq in retaliation for Soleimani killing.

label: Iran tensions ease
description: US and Iran step back from direct conflict; markets partially unwind Soleimani risk premium.

label: Vienna nuclear talks resume
description: Iran and world powers resume JCPOA negotiations in Vienna after US 2018 withdrawal.

label: Raisi elected Iran president
description: Hardliner Ebrahim Raisi wins Iranian presidential election; market concern over nuclear deal prospects.

label: Vienna talks stall
description: JCPOA revival talks stall as Iran presents maximalist demands; US threatens new sanctions.

label: Russia invades Ukraine
description: Russia launches full-scale invasion of Ukraine; global energy supply shock; Brent spikes toward $130.

label: JCPOA talks collapse
description: Iran nuclear deal negotiations in Vienna break down. Deal revival set back indefinitely.

label: Iran protests begin
description: Mass protests erupt in Iran following death of Mahsa Amini; political uncertainty and regime crackdown.

label: OPEC+ cuts output 2mbpd
description: OPEC+ announces 2 million bpd production cut from November 2022 despite US pressure.

label: Iran-Saudi normalisation
description: China brokers Iran-Saudi Arabia diplomatic deal to restore relations after 7-year break.

label: OPEC+ surprise cut
description: Saudi Arabia and OPEC+ announce surprise voluntary production cut of ~1.6 mbpd; Brent jumps $5/bbl.

label: OPEC+ extends cuts
description: Saudi Arabia announces extra 1 mbpd voluntary cut from July 2023; OPEC+ extends broader cuts into 2024.

label: Hamas attacks Israel
description: Hamas launches large-scale attack on southern Israel from Gaza. Regional escalation risk spikes.

label: Iran warns on Hormuz
description: Iranian officials warn of potential Strait of Hormuz action if conflict spreads. Shipping risk rises.

label: Israel ground operation begins
description: Israel launches ground operation into Gaza. Iran/Hezbollah escalation concerns lift crude risk premium.

label: Gaza temporary ceasefire
description: Temporary ceasefire agreed between Israel and Hamas. Partial unwinding of conflict risk premium.

label: US UK strikes on Houthis
description: US and UK launch airstrikes on Houthi targets in Yemen following Red Sea shipping attacks.

label: US strikes Iran proxies
description: US strikes 85 targets across Iraq and Syria operated by Iran-backed militias.

label: Houthi attacks persist
description: Houthis continue attacks on Red Sea shipping; tanker rerouting via Cape of Good Hope continues.

label: Israel strikes Damascus
description: Israel strikes Iranian consulate building in Damascus; kills senior IRGC commanders.

label: Iran attacks Israel direct
description: Iran launches direct attack on Israel: ~300 drones and ballistic missiles. First direct Iran-Israel military exchange.

label: Israel strikes Iran
description: Israel carries out retaliatory strike on Iranian territory. Measured response; limited scale relief.

label: Iran-Israel tensions ease
description: Both Iran and Israel signal no desire for further direct escalation. Risk premium partially unwinds.

label: Raisi dies helicopter crash
description: Iranian President Raisi and Foreign Minister Amir-Abdollahian killed in helicopter crash in northwestern Iran.

label: Haniyeh killed in Tehran
description: Hamas political leader Ismail Haniyeh killed in explosion in Tehran. Iran vows retaliation.

label: Hezbollah attacks Israel
description: Hezbollah launches largest attack on northern Israel since 2006 war. Iran escalation risk re-prices.

label: OPEC+ delays production hike
description: OPEC+ delays planned October output increase by two months due to weak demand.

label: Iran ballistic missiles at Israel
description: Iran launches ~180 ballistic missiles at Israel — largest direct attack to date. Brent spikes.

label: Israel strikes Iran
description: Israel launches retaliatory airstrikes on Iranian air defense and missile production sites.

label: Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire
description: US-brokered Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire takes effect. Cross-border hostilities pause.

label: Gaza ceasefire begins
description: Gaza ceasefire enters into force. Phase 1 hostage releases begin. Regional conflict risk reduces.

label: Trump maximum pressure Iran
description: Trump administration announces reinstatement of maximum pressure campaign; new Iran sanctions threatened.

label: New Iran sanctions announced
description: US announces new sanctions targeting buyers of Iranian crude oil under maximum pressure policy.

label: US-Iran indirect talks
description: Reports of indirect US-Iran nuclear contacts via Oman channel.

label: US resumes Houthi strikes
description: US military launches new round of airstrikes on Houthi infrastructure in Yemen.

label: Iran-US nuclear talks Oman
description: Iran and US hold direct nuclear talks in Oman — first direct dialogue since 2018. Positive initial signals.

label: OPEC+ production adjustment
description: OPEC+ confirms a 206 kb/d production adjustment for May 2026.

label: Hormuz declared open
description: Markets react to headlines that the Strait of Hormuz is declared open.

label: Ceasefire collapse fears
description: Oil rebounds sharply as fears grow that the US-Iran ceasefire may collapse.

label: Hormuz traffic near standstill
description: Shipping traffic remains near a virtual standstill through Hormuz.

label: US-Iran talks optimism
description: Renewed optimism around possible US-Iran talks ahead of truce deadline.
